description: A typed organisational unit the seminary routes academic work through — a teaching department that owns courses, a program committee that owns programs, an interdepartment that co-owns joint courses, or a board/committee. The org spine faculty, courses, and routing hang on.

fields.description: Short code, e.g. ST. For an Academic Department this is the source of the course prefix (ST 501); for an Interdepartment it is the joint-course prefix.
fields.label: Code

fields.description: What this unit owns/does. Academic Department owns courses; Program Committee owns programs; Academic Interdepartment co-owns joint courses (lists its member units below); Board / Other Committee are governance groupings.
fields.label: Type
fields.options:
Academic Department
Academic Interdepartment
Program Committee
Board
Other Committee

fields.description: Descriptive only — all gating stays role-based (ADR 034). The chair does not get special permissions from this field.
fields.label: Chair

fields.description: Publish this unit and its faculty roster on the public website ("Our Team").
fields.label: Publish on Web

fields.description: Controls order on the public "Our Team" page. 0 = render this unit's roster inline on the page; greater than 0 = show a card (in this order) linking to the unit's own page.
fields.label: Web Order

fields.description: Uncheck to retire this unit without deleting it.
fields.label: Is Active

fields.description: The constituent Academic Departments that co-own this interdepartment's courses. Faculty eligibility is resolved transitively from these units at query time — nothing is copied in.
fields.label: Member Units

name: Academic Unit
